query:
UPDATE customers SET 
  fieldManager = CASE 
    WHEN id <= 5 THEN 1
    WHEN id <= 10 THEN 2
    WHEN id <= 15 THEN 3
    ELSE NULL
  END,
  assignmentStatus = CASE 
    WHEN id <= 10 THEN 'assigned'
    ELSE 'unassigned'
  END
WHERE id > 0;
